title: convolvulus serpens
intro: Convolvulus serpens, also known as creeping bindweed, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Convolvulus serpens has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, and may also have antiviral and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used topically in the form of creams or ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
